title: tephrosia reptans var. arenicola
intro: Tephrosia reptans var. arenicola, also known as the sand pea or yellow pea shrub, is a plant species native to Africa, characterized by its small yellow flowers and pea-like pods. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits associated with Tephrosia reptans var. arenicola include its potential to treat skin conditions, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, which can be used to promote wound healing and relieve various health complaints.
